title: Eva 01s Berserk Moments
wikitext:
[]: Eva 01's Berserk Moments             Quote Post by Blood Type: Blue » Sun Jan 06, 2013 6:06 am I was always curious as to exactly how Unit 01 was able to restart without power, I realized that it was a reaction on Yui's part to protect Shinji but how did it start without an S2 engine or having both seeds of life, or did the eva being constructed from lillith allow it to do this?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 06, 2013 11:37 am Eva-01 moved without power or any seemingly obvious reason three times. First, in episode one, where the EVA protects Shinji with its arm; second, when she breaks out of Leliel; and finally, directly before she takes the S2 engine into herself. My guess is that the EVA unit was running entirely off of Yui's will. Remember: Eva-01 is a semi-sentient being. It needs power to run, but is sometimes able to do otherwise. So the Lilith construction is probably your most likely point.

[]:             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sun Jan 06, 2013 1:59 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Eva-01 moved without power or any seemingly obvious reason three times. First, in episode one, where the EVA protects Shinji with its arm; second, when she breaks out of Leliel; and finally, directly before she takes the S2 engine into herself. My guess is that the EVA unit was running entirely off of Yui's will. Remember: Eva-01 is a semi-sentient being. It needs power to run, but is sometimes able to do otherwise. So the Lilith construction is probably your most likely point.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Jan 06, 2013 2:33 pm Lilith or Adam, the Evas are biologically based - so I see the possibility that in extremis they can activate their muscles through good old metabolism.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Jan 06, 2013 5:05 pm Yui is just really hot-blooded I guess. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Blood Type: Blue » Sun Jan 06, 2013 7:44 pm Of course another point here that applies is the differences between Unit 02s berserker moments as well. Unit 02 always seemed able to go berserk when the sync ratio was extremely high as well as Asuka being in mortal danger, seen in that Shinji and Asuka both broke their sync ratios for a few seconds when facing Gaghiel. Another point is that when Unit 02 goes berserk the pilot is still largely in control, whereas when Unit 01 goes berserk Shinji is sidelined and Yui takes control. Also I think Unit 00 never went berserk because Rei understood her connection with the Eva and this was particularly disturbing and traumatic for her, so she was never able to sync as well as the other two pilots.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 07, 2013 1:20 am See: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3847/Berserkers-power-source/ And more recently: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/364269/Alternative-to-soul-juice-theory/?sid=8133576ca9d9e1923f3370198d4f0668
